name: 五金圣剑模拟器
short_description: Hardware Excalibur is a simulation game based on DIY assembly with ‘hardware components’. Explore endless possibilities! Use hardware parts to piece together your ‘Excalibur’, unleash your imagination, and create your own legendary weapon!
detailed_description:
【Easy to Start, Freedom to Create】
With simple selections and drag-and-drop actions, you can freely rotate and assemble hardware components in a 3D world. Each movement is a challenge to your creativity, and every combination is a release of your imagination.

【Unlimited Creativity, Precise Replication】
Whether you’re meticulously replicating classic designs 1:1 from blueprints or expressing your individuality by piecing together various hardware parts into the masterpiece of your dreams, this is the stage to showcase your creativity. Let’s see who can create the most astonishing ‘Excalibur’!

【Delicate Rendering, Ready to Display】
High-definition realistic rendering brings every ‘Excalibur’ to life. Anytime, anywhere, you can display your creative achievements, enjoying the satisfaction and pride that comes with each creation.

supported_languages:

*languages with full audio support
